reviews.comment:
Tengan cuidado. "Cargamos" 300 pesos de combustible calculando que todavía teníamos 10 litros, es decir que cargamos un poco más de 15 litros más los diez existentes son 25 litros, estábamos con problemas de la bomba de nafta y teníamos que ir sacando del tanque y cargando un bidón de 5 litros. El cual pudimos llenar dos veces. No había más nafta en el tanque. Gracias a Dios teníamos gas para poder llegar a San Juan. OJO CONTROLEN QUE LES CARGUEN EL TANQUE.

(Translated by Google)
Be careful. We "filled up" with 300 pesos worth of fuel, figuring we still had 10 liters left. That means we filled up with a little over 15 liters, plus the existing 10, making 25 liters. We were having problems with the fuel pump and had to keep siphoning fuel from the tank and filling a 5-liter jerrycan. We were able to fill it twice. There was no more gasoline in the tank. Thank God we had enough gas to get us to San Juan. PAY ATTENTION: MAKE SURE THEY FILL YOUR TANK.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBemY2U2dnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Tipica estacion de reunion de viajeros !! Tienen combustibles, muchas veces hay cola, los baños estan bien, pero la comida es cara. Hasta una simple botella de agua sin gas tiene precio alto. Es un buen lugar

(Translated by Google)
Typical bus station for travelers! They have fuel, there's often a line, the restrooms are fine, but the food is expensive. Even a simple bottle of still water is expensive. It's a good place.
